NAVAREA XIX 63/26

MILITARY EXERCISE INCLUDING LIVE WEAPONS FIRING IN PROGRESS FROM 180001 UTC MAY TO 292359 UTC MAY, WITHIN FOLLOWING AREA:

NATO MILITARY EXERCISE

65-30.00N 008-00.00W

65-30.00N 012-00.00E

57-30.00N 012-00.00E

57-30.00N 008-00.00W

65-30.00N 008-00.00W

MARINERS ARE REQUESTED TO NAVIGATE WITH CAUTION, KEEP CLEAR OF ALL NAVAL SHIPS WHICH MAY BE UNLIT AND PAY ATTENTION TO SIGNALS SHOWN.

CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 300001 UTC MAY 26.
